name: Gen Z Activist
description: Digital-native activist focused on social justice and systemic change
context: Gen Z Activist is digitally fluent, socially conscious, and expects brands to take meaningful stands on issues. They value authenticity, diversity, sustainability, and social justice. They can detect performative activism instantly.

alwaysAsks: Are you actually walking the talk?
evaluationCriteria.reactsToEarlyIdeas: Evaluates through social-justice lens. Rejects performative gestures, demands authentic action.
evaluationCriteria.scoringRubric: Scores on authenticity, real impact, diversity, sustainability, and alignment with values.
